main.description: Report the status of a timestamp-import job: lifecycle state, current phase, per-phase progress, and (on completion) the parse/mutation totals. With no job parameter, reports the current or most recent job. Bearer-token gated: without a configured token the endpoint always returns 401.

job.description: Job id returned by importTimestamps. When omitted, the current or most recent job is reported.

phase.description: Current phase: parse_bucket (Phase A+B) or apply (Phase C).

error.description: Failure detail; present only when state is failed.

finishedAt.description: Present only for a terminal job.

bucketed.description: Whether Phase A+B completed (the offset files are durable).

segmentsToApply.description: Segments Phase C will process (after resume-skips).

segmentsApplied.description: Segments processed so far in Phase C.

errors.name: JobNotFound
errors.description: No import job matches the supplied id, or no job has ever run when the id is omitted.
